description.en: Creates a customer profile for storing payment methods. The customer email is unique per account.

Saves a tokenized card to a customer profile for future payments. The token must be created client-side via MercadoPago.js. Raw card data must never pass through your server.
**PCI scope:** Handling this endpoint brings your integration into PCI DSS scope.

title.en: Save a card to a customer

description.en: Permanently deletes a customer profile. This action cannot be undone. Saved cards associated with the customer will also be removed.
Adds a shipping or billing address to a customer profile.
Payer identification document. Valid types vary by country.
Identification type (e.g., CPF, CNPJ for Brazil; DNI for Argentina; RFC for Mexico)
Pagination metadata returned in list/search responses
Request body to create or update a customer
ID of the customer's default card

Request body to save a card to a customer. The card token must be created client-side via MercadoPago.js / MP Secure Fields before calling this endpoint. Raw card data (PAN, CVV) must never be sent to your server.
A tokenized card saved to a customer (never contains full PAN or CVV)
First 6 digits of card (BIN — identifies issuer and type)
Request body to update a saved card's expiry or cardholder data.
Name as it appears on the card.
